creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179279
pear-File_MARC-1.1.5.patch

- Update to 1.1.5

Changelog: 

  1.1.5
  * Drop support for PHP 5.3 and 5.4

  1.1.4
  * Fix insertField() behaviour, which could truncate records  
    (reported by Andreas Roussos)
  * Docs correction for Data_Field (thanks Daniel Walter)


[Q/A]
